positive: A vibrant, minimalist illustration of a whimsical forest scene at twilight. The central subject is a silhouette of a curious fox sitting amongst glowing toadstools and delicate ferns. The style is a highly detailed modern kawaii aesthetic with clean vector lines and bold, contrasting colors (deep indigo, teal, coral pink, and lime green). The composition is perfectly centered and framed for apparel printing. The lighting suggests bioluminescence emanating from the flora, casting soft, ethereal halos. The background should be mostly negative space or solid color gradients to ensure optimal print contrast. High resolution, maximalist detail, vector illustration, flat design elements, perfect symmetry.
negative: low detail, blurry, text, signature, logo, watermark, cropped, deformed, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, ugly, noise, grain, photographic, 3d render, low contrast
